message:
fix(e2e): remove --exact flag from revocation flow test runners and update test vectors

The --exact flag in cargo test was causing test filtering to be overly
restrictive, preventing pattern-based test name matching in the
revocation E2E flow scripts. Removing it allows partial name matching
which is more robust when test names change or new variants are added.

- revocation_flow.sh: Drop --exact from run_exact_lib_test and
  run_exact_bin_test (keep --nocapture for output visibility)
- Update enrollment and simulate CBOR request vectors to match
  current serialization format
- Update .beads/issues.jsonl tracking state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
